ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-05-2006 Assigned To Master Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for a petition for a name change hearing in Department 611. Petitioner present/affirmed. There being no opposition to the publication, a decree changing name from Hayley House to Hayley House Badovinus was signed in open court
Judge: Diane Elan Wick; Reporter: Sonia Wong; Clerk: Rani Edwards ( Dept. 611 )
